---
description: "Use when editing i18n messages, locale config, or translation strings. Covers message file structure and adding new keys."
applyTo: "messages/*.json"
---
# i18n Guidelines

## Message Files

- `messages/ja.json` — Japanese (default locale)
- `messages/en.json` — English

Both files must have the **same keys**. When adding a key to one, add it to the other.

## Structure

Messages are organized by page/feature:

```json
{
  "nav": { "home": "...", "blog": "...", "portfolio": "...", "about": "..." },
  "home": { "greeting": "...", "subtitle": "...", ... },
  "blog": { "title": "...", ... },
  "portfolio": { "title": "...", ... },
  "about": { "title": "...", ... },
  "footer": { ... },
  "common": { "language": "...", "darkMode": "...", "lightMode": "..." }
}
```

## Usage

In Server Components: `const dict = await getDictionary(locale)` then `dict.nav.home`.
